$comment: scripts/VermilionGym.asm VermilionGymLtSurgeText — challenge -> OPP_LT_SURGE -> THUNDERBADGE + BEAT_LT_SURGE + the gym's trainers defeated (gh #109) -> TM24. A full bag forfeits the TM for good (gh #174).

then.text:
A little word of
advice, kid! Electricity is
sure powerful! But, it's useless
against ground-
type POKéMON!

else.text:
Hey, kid! What do
you think you're
doing here? You won't live
long in combat!
That's for sure! I tell you kid,
electric POKéMON
saved me during
the war! They zapped my
enemies into
paralysis! The same as I'll
do to you!

then.text:
Whoa! You're the real
deal, kid! Fine then, take
the THUNDERBADGE!

The THUNDERBADGE
cranks up your
POKéMON's SPEED! It also lets your
POKéMON FLY any
time, kid! You're special,
kid! Take this!

TM24 contains
THUNDERBOLT! Teach it to an
electric POKéMON!
